LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS COMPLAINANT FRANK & ME LLC, AND, LAUREN BLACKWELDER'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED COMPLAINT AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION TO STRIKE IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO ESTABLISH THE COMMUNICATION IS PROTECTED ACTIVITY. INSUFFICIENT SHOWING THAT WHEN COMMUNICATION MADE A LAWSUIT WAS UNDER SERIOUS CONSIDERATION. SEE A.F. BROWN VS. RHINO ELECTRIC SUPPLY (2006) 137 CAL.APP. 4TH 1118. OBJECTION TO BLACKWELDER DECLARATION IS OVERRULED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Ryan J. Vlasak, Esq. of Bracamontes & Vlasak, Motion to be relieved as COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT FRANK & ME LLC. Appearances: Kristen Ross, Esq. of Bracamontes & Vlasak, (415) 835-6777, appearing for moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Default Prove-Up Hearing On The Cross-Complaint.
Off Calendar May-07-2009 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike Amended Complaint And Request For Attorney'S Fees And Costs,
Off Calendar Jun-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS COMPLAINANT FRANK & ME LLC, and, LAUREN BLACKWELDER'S Special Motion to Strike Amended Complaint and Request for Attorney's Fees And Costs. Appearances: Plaintiff Tedda Hughes, appearing in Pro Per, and opposing party. There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to strike is denied. Defendant fails to establish the communication is protected activity. Insufficient showing that when communication made a lawsuit was under serious consideration. See A.F. Brown vs. Rhino Electric Supply (2006) 137 Cal.App. 4th 1118. Objection to Blackwelder declaration is overruled. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW/JW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF TEDDA HUGHES' Motion to Set Aside Default Entered Against Moving Party On March-30-09[CCP 473]. Appearances: Kristen Ross, of Bracamontes & Vlasak, (415) 835-6777, appearing for Defendants, and opposing party; Tedda Hughes, Plaintiff in Pro Per appearing, and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted. (Answer may be filed today). Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW/VC)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2009 Continued To Jun-12-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FRANK & ME LLC, and, LAUREN BLACKWELDER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Tedda Hughes, Plaintiff in Pro Per appearing; Ryan J. Vlasak, Esq. of Bracamontes & Vlasak, (415) 835-6777; appearing for Defendants Frank and Me LLC and Lauren Blackwelder, and moving party. No argument is allowed; Plaintiff failed to give notice pursuant to Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Sustained with ten days leave to amend.
